CASE COMES ON CALENDAR FOR STATUS RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT. PARTIES BY AND THROUGH THEIR COUNSEL STIPULATE TO A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH JUDGE ROBERTSON. IF CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES AGREE THAT JUDGE ROBERTSON IS NOT DISQUALIFIED FROM HANDLING CASE. THE COURT ORDERS COUNSEL, PARTIES AND ALL CARRIERS PRESENT FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. THIS MATTER IS CONTINUED TO NOVEMBER 29, 2010 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 502 FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II, CSR: JOYCE LONG, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA (502).
